title: TNT Arrows
description: Adds arrows that can be mixed with TNTs for explosive effects!
body:
This mod lets you mix arrows and TNT to create explosive arrows. The mod is compatible with most modded TNT blocks.

To craft a TNT arrow, put 1 arrow and 1 valid TNT block in a crafting table. The result will be a TNT arrow that creates an explosion from the given TNT once it lands.

# __**RECOMMENDED MOD:**__

For a better experience, it is highly recommended that you install a mod that adds more TNT, such as:

### \- [More Fun TNTs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fun-tnts)

 

This mod is available for NeoForge and Fabric.
